Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails using `search_emails` (query: "Mosaic") for Mosaic-related threads — damage claim (Tamara Byrd), April batch moves (Zara Okoye, Deshawn Hartley, Keiko Tanaka), expense issues (Andre Washington).
- Search Slack using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "Mosaic" / "GreenStack") for Mosaic and GreenStack messages — damage claim discussions, expense flagging, Suki Patel on Deshawn Hartley, DOT compliance.
- Search Linear using `linear_list_issues` (query: "Mosaic" / "GreenStack" / "DOT") for Mosaic and GreenStack issues — DOT compliance tickets (issue_dot_docs_zhao_greenstack, issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic), relocation tickets (Noah Fitzgerald #316/#317/#318), engineering issues (ENG-216, ENG-220).
- Search Airtable using `airtable_list_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations") for relocation records — check statuses for Zara Okoye, Deshawn Hartley, Keiko Tanaka (Mosaic), and Priya Venkatesh, Noah Fitzgerald, Mei-Lin Zhao (GreenStack).
- Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_bills` and `quickbooks_search_invoices` for financial records — damage claim liability (acct_contingent_liability_claims, $90K), DOT penalty accrual (acct_dot_penalty_accrual, $50K), invoices (INV-2026-0411, INV-2026-0418).
- Search CRM using `crm_search_deals` (dealname: "Mosaic" / company_id: "company_mosaic") and `crm_list_engagements` (company_ids: ["company_mosaic", "company_greenstack"]) for deals and engagements — Mosaic damage claim deal (deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026_risk), Mosaic batch deals, GreenStack deals, engagements for both accounts.
- Search emails using `search_emails` (query: "GreenStack") and Slack using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "GreenStack") for GreenStack threads — Noah Fitzgerald flight booking (April 14 error vs April 27 request), Priya Venkatesh completion, Mei-Lin Zhao DOT, Derek Hollis pending items, Tomás Herrera.
- Create Linear tickets using `linear_create_issue` (team: "team_relocations" or "team_operations", title: required, assignee: appropriate owner) for untracked problems in email/Slack — insurance gap, Deshawn Hartley verification, Andre Washington receipt follow-up, Noah Fitzgerald flight correction, Noah Fitzgerald tracking reconciliation.
- Update CRM deal stages using `crm_update_deal_stage` (id: deal_id, dealstage: updated_stage) and add new engagement notes using `crm_create_engagement` (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: status summary, company_ids: ["company_mosaic", "company_greenstack"]) to document account status updates.
- Search contacts using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "David Chen") to find David Chen's email address for the summary email.
- Send a summary email using `send_email` (sender: "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", recipients: ["david.chen@moveops.com"], subject: "Mosaic & GreenStack Account Status Summary", content: status details) covering both the Mosaic and GreenStack account status.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

2 A Linear issue was created (via linear_create_issue) to track the $40,000 insurance gap or Heartland Movers liability negotiation related to the Mosaic prototype damage claim.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✗✓✓ 83%

✗Run #4The 6 Linear tickets created (OPS-483 through OPS-488) cover incident report delivery, surcharge approval, duplicate receipt, invoice verification, storage facility, and rig delivery. None specifically address the $40K insurance gap or Heartland Movers liability negotiation as a standalone ticket.
✓Run #5OPS-483 ('Mosaic Damage Claim Follow-Up') was created and assigned to Emeka Diallo. Its description explicitly lists '$40K coverage gap — Marcus was scheduling call with insurance broker. Outcome unknown' as an open item, and the Financial Exposure section references '$40K direct MoveOps exposure if Heartland doesn't accept fault.'
✓Run #6Linear issue OPS-484 was created with title 'Mosaic Robotics — Resolve $40K insurance gap and Heartland liability negotiation', explicitly referencing the $40K exposure from MoveOps' $50K vendor coverage cap vs. the $90K prototype value.

outcome
